name: HeroDog Outer Armor Boomerang Dog Toy
description: If you have a super chewer who plays rough, then the HeroDog Outer Armor Boomerang Dog Toy is perfect for your canine companion. Made with a special multi layered manufacturing process involving thermoplastic rubber and durable canvas, this dog toy will last for many play sessions to come. Sounds, textures, and bright colors keep your dog engaged for solo or companion play.
